responses.question: Imagine you are tasked with integrating a third-party AI service (e.g., an LLM API) into an existing full-stack application. The API has rate limits and occasional latency spikes. How would you design the integration to ensure reliability, performance, and graceful degradation? Include your approach to error handling, retries, and fallback mechanisms.
responses.answer: The candidate mentioned using load balancing for handling multiple users reaching the server simultaneously but did not elaborate on the full design for integrating a third-party AI service with rate limits and latency spikes. They did not discuss error handling, retries, or fallback mechanisms.
